submitted_payload.suggested_entry: Ralph Workflow — free open-source workflow layer for unattended coding runs that aims to hand back finished, tested code ready to review instead of another confident summary

why_this_action: Codeberg adoption is still flat, same-family directory submissions are paused, Apollo is inside its measurement window, and the StackOverflow lane still lacks an authenticated posting session. This awesome list was still untouched in outreach-log.md, already had a prepared artifact, and directly matches Ralph Workflow's reviewable unattended-coding angle, so executing one manual-contact packet here was the strongest live action available right now.
